description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a main battle tank, featuring a low-profile, angular hull and turret. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent main cannon mounted centrally on the turret, and several hatches and periscopes are visible on the upper surfaces. The sides of the vehicle display wide, flat armor skirts covering the tracks, which are supported by multiple large road wheels. At the rear, two large brown storage boxes or fuel tanks are mounted externally, secured with metal straps. The overall exterior is painted in a light, solid color, with no visible camouflage or military markings. The design emphasizes protection and firepower, with sloped armor and robust construction throughout.
description: A heavily armored, light-colored combat vehicle with a central cannon, angular turret, and wide tracks covered by armor skirts. Rear-mounted brown storage boxes and a solid paint scheme complete its robust appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, central cannon, and angular turret with visible hatches and periscopes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long, flat armor skirts, multiple road wheels, and the rear-mounted brown storage boxes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two large brown storage boxes or fuel tanks, rear armor, and the back of the turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, armor skirts, and external storage at the rear.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; side skirts protect the tracks; armor appears robust and continuous.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; vehicle is painted in a solid light beige color.
